title: Toasty Mittens
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: On the first round of combat, this relic will attempt to exhaust a non-Innate card before falling back to the top card. The Strength is applied after exhausting a card.
